mean_cn: v.不同意，有分歧，持不同意见
mean_en: if two people disagree or one person disagrees with another about something, they have a different opinion about it
sentence: He waved his finger to me, which means he disagreed with my idea.
sentence_trans: 他对我摇晃手指，这意味着他不同意我的想法。
word_etyma: dis否定 + agree赞同 → disagree不同意
